title: Shop Squared
tileSummary: Inventory management app for ecommerce and event workflows.
longSummary: A browser-based inventory management app built with Vue 3 and Vite, designed initially for our Spring Con inventory. It combines a fast, clean frontend with a Node-based architecture and a Supabase backend to manage bins, items, and product variations efficiently. The app includes a login system with session persistence, uses GitHub secrets to protect sensitive configuration, and processes CSV/XLSX files entirely in the browser for secure, client-side data handling, making it a practical tool for real-time inventory tracking in ecommerce and event environments.
